metadata.description: Multi-turn VQA — wrong-way driver on highway ramp

content.text: You are an expert traffic analyst. Answer questions about the provided video concisely and accurately.
How many vehicles are visible in this clip?
Four vehicles are visible: three traveling in the correct direction on the highway ramp and one traveling in the wrong direction against oncoming traffic.
Is there an anomalous event? If so, describe it and estimate when it occurs.

Yes. Starting at approximately 00:02, a light-colored SUV is driving the wrong way on the highway on-ramp, heading directly toward oncoming vehicles. The event persists until the end of the clip at 00:09. The other drivers swerve to avoid a collision. This constitutes a wrong-way driving violation.
